features.title: Access to Opportunities
features.description: Get direct access to exclusive brand deals and sponsorship opportunities tailored to your niche.

features.title: Campaigns and Drops
features.description: Participate in high-impact UGC campaigns and limited-edition product drops.

features.title: Early Access
features.description: Be the first to play new titles and test upcoming features before they hit the mainstream.

features.title: Events and Tournaments
features.description: Compete in exclusive tournaments and attend VIP industry events worldwide.

features.title: Community and Visibility
features.description: Boost your reach through our network and connect with a community of elite creators.

faqs.question: What is the JG Gamechanger Network?
faqs.answer: JG Gamechanger Network is a premier platform designed to bridge the gap between elite gaming creators and world-class brands for UGC campaigns and partnerships.

faqs.question: How do I qualify for the network?
faqs.answer: We look for creators with high engagement, consistent quality, and a strong presence in the gaming community. Every application is manually vetted by our team.

faqs.question: Is there a cost to join?
faqs.answer: No, joining the network is completely free for creators. We earn by facilitating successful partnerships between you and the brands.

faqs.question: What kind of campaigns can I expect?
faqs.answer: Campaigns range from sponsored gameplay and product reviews to long-term brand ambassadorships and exclusive event coverage.

creatorTypes.title: Esports
creatorTypes.description: Competitive players, hosts, analysts, tournament/event coverage.

creatorTypes.title: Fan Creators
creatorTypes.description: Art, Cosplayers, UGC concepts, community Builds.

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Submit your details, platforms and format. We only ask what helps us activate your quickly.

steps.title: Review
steps.description: We score for quality, consistency and fit. Creators are bucketed for the right opportunities.

steps.title: Activate
steps.description: Selected creators receive briefs, assets and opportunities. As the Network grows, rewards expand.

steps.title: Scale
steps.description: We turn what works into a repeatable creator engines for JioGames now, and Jio next.
